description: Leading mobile R&D strategy for an IoT-connected parking management platform integrating smart locks, IP cameras, LPR systems, and MQTT-enabled sensors. Consolidated 5+ fragmented app variants into a single modular, feature-toggled platform, cutting code duplication by 60% and reducing new feature development time by 40%.

Established Accumed's mobile engineering department from zero: defined the technology stack (Flutter, Clean Architecture, BLoC), designed sprint structure, created code review standards, and implemented CI/CD pipelines via Codemagic. Led end-to-end hiring and onboarding of iOS, Android, and Flutter developers.

Provided senior technical leadership for a white-label multi-tenant ERP platform serving multiple enterprise clients from a single codebase. Implemented OAuth2/JWT authentication, RBAC access control, PCI-DSS-compliant encrypted storage, and offline-first sync across 5 delivered modules.

Led technical delivery of two experimental mobile platforms for UNDP's humanitarian programme: an ARCore/ARKit augmented reality heritage preservation app and a biometrically-secured legal consultation platform with end-to-end encrypted communication and reusable native Swift/Kotlin SDKs.

Led a cross-functional mobile team delivering 5+ production applications for international clients across e-commerce, healthcare, and logistics. Established CI/CD with GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle time by 25%, and implemented Clean Architecture across all projects, reducing crash rates by ~15%.

Developed and maintained native iOS (Swift) and Android (Java) applications for Syria's largest telecommunications provider, architecting secure payment flows for a 10M+ user base. Built test automation frameworks (XCTest/Espresso) that reduced manual testing time by 30%.

Engineered automation software interfacing directly with precision measurement instruments via hardware communication protocols — building foundational hardware-software integration expertise that underpins current IoT and connected-device engineering work.
